props.content:
# Artifact Schema — Unified Creation System

## Status: ✅ IMPLEMENTED & WIRED

All creation surfaces now use a single /_storyboard/artifact/ API.

## 7 Artifact Types

prototype, canvas, component, flow, object, record, page — all supported in Command Palette, Viewfinder, and CLI.

## Key Decisions

1. Canvas story creation stays on /create-story (lightweight inline op)
2. Component names accept PascalCase or kebab-case
3. Objects/records support prototype scoping
4. Old workshop endpoints preserved for backward compat
5. Content field auto-mapped (UI sends string JSON, API normalizes)s

# ArtifactForm — UI Layer

Renders forms from `ARTIFACT_SCHEMAS` at `src/components/ArtifactForm/artifactSchemas.js`.

## How the UI Consumes the Schema

```jsx
<ArtifactForm type="prototype" onSubmit={fn} />
// or with type picker:
<ArtifactForm onSubmit={fn} />
```

### Schema → Field Rendering

Each schema entry drives the form automatically:

| Schema field type | Renders as |
|---|---|
| `text` | `<TextInput>` with pattern hint caption |
| `url` | `<TextInput type="url">` with URL validation |
| `textarea` | `<Textarea rows={3}>` |
| `code` | `<Textarea rows={8}>` monospace + JSON validation |
| `select` | `<select>` — static options or `dynamic: "prototypes"` |
| `checkbox` | `<input type="checkbox">` inline with label |

### Schema → Validation

`validateArtifact(type, values)` runs client-side before submit:

1. **Required** — checks `field.required`
2. **Pattern** — regex from `field.pattern` (kebab-case, PascalCase, path)
3. **Max length** — `field.maxLength` (64 chars for names)
4. **URL format** — `new URL()` parse for `type: "url"` fields
5. **JSON parse** — `JSON.parse()` for `type: "code"` fields
6. **Mutual exclusivity** — `schema.mutuallyExclusive` groups (e.g. url+flow on prototype)

### Schema → Type Picker

The `TypeSelector` component reads all keys from `ARTIFACT_SCHEMAS` and renders a Primer `ActionMenu` dropdown with:
- `schema.icon` as leading visual
- `schema.label` as item text
- `schema.description` as block description

Switching types resets form values to that schema field defaults.

### Compact Mode

`<ArtifactForm compact>` filters `visibleFields` to only `field.required === true`, showing the minimal creation form.

### Schema → Submit Payload

On valid submit, calls `onSubmit({ type, operation, values })` where `values` maps field names to their input values. The consumer (command palette, canvas menu, CLI) translates this to the API call:

```js
// values from form:
{ name: "my-app", title: "My App", folder: "main", flow: true }
// → POST /_storyboard/artifact/
// body: { type: "prototype", name: "my-app", title: "My App", folder: "main", flow: true }
```

## Integration Points

- **Command Palette** — `CreateDialog.jsx` will import `ArtifactForm` + `ARTIFACT_SCHEMAS`
- **Canvas Add Menu** — renders `ArtifactForm` in a popover
- **Workspace Button** — renders `ArtifactForm` in a dialog
- **CLI** — `storyboard artifact create <type>` reads same schemas for flag generation

## File Structure

```
src/components/ArtifactForm/
├── artifactSchemas.js    ← Schema definitions + validateArtifact()
├── ArtifactForm.jsx      ← Main component (TypeSelector, FieldRenderer)
├── ArtifactForm.module.css
└── artifact-form.story.jsx  ← 11 stories
```

# Artifact Schema & API Specification

## 1. Schema Format

Each artifact type is defined by a JSON Schema document stored in `packages/storyboard/src/core/artifact/schemas/`. The schema drives validation, form rendering, and CLI help text.

```json
// schemas/prototype.schema.json
{
  "$id": "artifact:prototype",
  "type": "object",
  "required": ["name"],
  "properties": {
    "name": {
      "type": "string",
      "pattern": "^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$",
      "maxLength": 64
    },
    "title": { "type": "string" },
    "description": { "type": "string" },
    "author": {
      "oneOf": [
        { "type": "string" },
        { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string" } }
      ]
    },
    "folder": { "type": "string" },
    "icon": { "type": "string" },
    "tags": { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string" } },
    "team": { "type": "string" },
    "url": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "uri",
      "description": "External URL — when present, prototype is external (no index.jsx)"
    },
    "flow": { "type": "boolean", "default": false },
    "partial": { "type": "string" }
  }
}
```

### All Artifact Types

| Type | Required | Optional |
|------|----------|----------|
| `prototype` | name | title, description, author, folder, icon, tags, team, flow, partial, **url** (makes it external) |
| `canvas` | name | title, description, folder, grid, jsx |
| `component` | name | directory |
| `flow` | name, prototype | title, description, author, folder, globals, copy-from, starting-page |
| `object` | name | folder, body (freeform JSON) |
| `record` | name | folder, entries (array with id) |
| `page` | prototype, path | folder, template |

> **Note:** External prototypes are just prototypes with a `url` field. When `url` is present, no `index.jsx` or flow is generated — the prototype opens the URL in a new tab.

All names: `^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$`, max 64 chars.

---

## 2. API Design

Endpoints at `/_storyboard/artifact/`:

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|--------|
| POST | `/` | Create artifact |
| PATCH | `/` | Edit metadata |
| DELETE | `/` | Delete artifact |
| GET | `/list?type=X` | List artifacts |
| GET | `/schema?type=X` | Get JSON Schema |

### POST / (Create)
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "folder": "main", "flow": true }
// → 201 { success, type, name, path, files[] }

// External prototype — same type, just add url:
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "figma-proto", "url": "https://figma.com/..." }
// → 201 { success, type, name, path, files: ["...prototype.json"] }
```

### PATCH / (Edit)
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "title": "New Title" }
// → 200 { success, updated }
```

### DELETE /
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "folder": "main" }
// → 200 { success, deleted }
```

### Errors
- 400: `{ error, field }` — validation failure
- 409: `{ error }` — name conflict
- 404: `{ error }` — not found

---

## 3. CLI Design

```bash
storyboard artifact create <type> [flags]
storyboard artifact edit <type> <name> [flags]
storyboard artifact delete <type> <name> [--force]
storyboard artifact list [type] [--folder X]
storyboard artifact schema <type>
```

Examples:
```bash
storyboard artifact create prototype --name my-app --folder main --flow
storyboard artifact create prototype --name figma-proto --url https://figma.com/...
storyboard artifact create canvas --name design-system
storyboard artifact create flow --name settings --prototype my-app
storyboard artifact create object --name nav --body '{"items":[]}'
storyboard artifact create component --name LoginForm
storyboard artifact create page --prototype my-app --path settings/general
```

Flags map 1:1 to schema fields. `--json` for structured output.

---

## 4. Validation Rules

1. **Parse** — coerce types (string→array for author)
2. **Schema validate** — JSON Schema (required, patterns, types)
3. **Semantic validate** — uniqueness, references exist, reserved names
4. Returns `{ valid: true, normalized }` or `{ valid: false, errors[] }`

| Rule | Scope |
|------|-------|
| Kebab-case, max 64 | all names |
| Unique within scope | all |
| Reserved: index, app, _app | prototype, page |
| Valid URL (when provided) | prototype with url |
| Prototype must exist | flow, page |
| No duplicate flow names | flow |
| url + flow are mutually exclusive | prototype |

---

## 5. Disk Operations

**prototype (standard):** `src/prototypes/{folder.folder?/}{name}/` → `.prototype.json` + `index.jsx` + optional `.flow.json`

**prototype (external, url provided):** same dir → `.prototype.json` with `url` field only. No index.jsx, no flow.

**canvas:** `src/canvas/{folder?/}{name}.canvas.jsonl` + optional `.canvas.jsx`

**component:** `src/components/{dir?/}{PascalName}/` → `.jsx` + `.module.css` + `.story.jsx`

**flow:** inside prototype dir → `{name}.flow.json`

**object:** `src/data/{name}.object.json` (global) or inside prototype (scoped)

**record:** `src/data/{name}.record.json` (global) or inside prototype (scoped)

**page:** inside prototype → `pages/{path}.jsx`

---

## 6. File Structure

```
packages/storyboard/src/core/artifact/
├── schemas/*.schema.json
├── validate.js
├── operations.js
├── routes.js
└── index.js
```

Integration: `routeHandlers.set('artifact', ...)` in server-plugin.js. Existing workshop routes become aliases during migration.

# CLI Builder: Done

Created `storyboard artifact` CLI command with 5 subcommands:

| Command | Method | Endpoint |
|---------|--------|----------|
| `artifact create <type>` | POST | `/_storyboard/artifact/` |
| `artifact edit <type> <name>` | PATCH | `/_storyboard/artifact/` |
| `artifact delete <type> <name>` | DELETE | `/_storyboard/artifact/` |
| `artifact list [type]` | GET | `/_storyboard/artifact/list` |
| `artifact schema <type>` | GET | `/_storyboard/artifact/schema` |

**File:** `packages/storyboard/src/core/cli/artifact.js`

**Features:**
- Interactive + non-interactive modes
- `--json` output for scripting
- `--force` to skip delete confirmation
- Aliases: `-n` name, `-t` title, `-f` folder, `-d` desc, `-a` author, `-p` prototype
- Registered in CLI router + help screen

# CreateDialog scroll fix

Moved `overflowY: auto` from the dialog wrapper into an inner scroll area, so the close button stays anchored while form content scrolls within `maxHeight: 80vh`.

**File:** `packages/storyboard/src/internals/CommandPalette/CreateDialog.jsx`

# CreateDialog: Primer Dialog

Replaced hand-rolled overlay with `Dialog` from `@primer/react/experimental`.

- Title/subtitle from schema (`schema.label` / `schema.description`)
- Built-in scroll body — header & close button stay fixed
- Added `hideHeader` prop to ArtifactForm to avoid duplicate title
- Removed all inline overlay/dialog/closeBtn styles

# Fixed doubled form chrome

ArtifactForm always rendered with padding + background + border + border-radius. Inside CreateDialog that nested card sat inside the Dialog body — visually doubling the frame.

**Change:** when hideHeader is true, the form now gets data-bare which strips the card chrome. Standalone usage keeps the card.

# Widget Artifact Dialogs — wired up

**Found:** the picker dialog (`WidgetArtifactDialog.jsx`) was already built in a prior session but **never opened**.

**Root cause:** Palette items for `prototype` / `story` / `component-set` dispatched `storyboard:open-widget-artifact-dialog`, but no `useEffect` listened for it.

**Fix:**
- Added the missing listener in `CommandPalette.jsx` — closes the palette and sets `widgetArtifactType`, which renders the `<Dialog>`.
- Extracted `buildPrototypeGroups` / `buildStoryList` to module scope so React Compiler can optimize.

**Result:** Selecting Prototype / Component / Component Set in the command palette now opens a Primer Dialog with full picker UI **before** the widget is created. No more empty widgets with awful in-canvas selection.

Commit: `549ac8c25`

# Fixed doubled form chrome

ArtifactForm always rendered with padding + background + border + border-radius. Inside CreateDialog that nested card sat inside the Dialog body — visually doubling the frame.

**Change:** when hideHeader is true, the form now gets data-bare which strips the card chrome. Standalone usage keeps the card.

Files:
- packages/storyboard/src/internals/ArtifactForm/ArtifactForm.jsx
- packages/storyboard/src/internals/ArtifactForm/ArtifactForm.module.cssa

# Widget Artifact Dialogs — wired up

**Found:** the picker dialog (`WidgetArtifactDialog.jsx`) was already built in a prior session but **never opened**.

**Root cause:** Palette items for `prototype` / `story` / `component-set` dispatched `storyboard:open-widget-artifact-dialog`, but no `useEffect` listened for it.

**Fix:**
- Added the missing listener in `CommandPalette.jsx` — closes the palette and sets `widgetArtifactType`, which renders the `<Dialog>`.
- Extracted `buildPrototypeGroups` / `buildStoryList` to module scope so React Compiler can optimize.

**Result:** Selecting Prototype / Component / Component Set in the command palette now opens a Primer Dialog with full picker UI **before** the widget is created. No more empty widgets with awful in-canvas selection.

Commit: `549ac8c25`

# Fixed doubled form chrome

ArtifactForm always rendered with padding + background + border + border-radius. Inside CreateDialog that nested card sat inside the Dialog body — visually doubling the frame.

**Change:** when hideHeader is true, the form now gets data-bare which strips the card chrome. Standalone usage keeps the card.

- packages/storyboard/src/internals/ArtifactForm/ArtifactForm.jsx
- packages/storyboard/src/internals/ArtifactForm/ArtifactForm.module.cssa

## Hub spawn bug fixed

Commit 0e44b580f on branch 0.5.0. Restart dev server to load the server-side change, then retry hub creation.

## Agent serverUrl bug — fixed

Confirmed via peer ej07t1 buffer (same symptom: CLI routing to wrong endpoint).

Two compounding bugs in terminal-server.js:
1. Port captured at configureServer time before httpServer bound → null → default 1234 (nothing listens)
2. Base path missing — endpoints live under /branch--<name>/

Fix (commit ba66226c3): capture port via listening event + re-poll; include base in serverUrl.

ALSO fixed earlier (0e44b580f): hub spawn wipe — stale debouncedSave overwrote freshly-batched agents.

RESTART dev server for both server-side changes; existing agent sessions need to be re-spawned to get corrected serverUrl.
